summary: Phase 2 testing complete. All backend APIs (19/19) and frontend features fully verified. Friends/Following UI, ISO standalone page, Profile 4 tabs all working correctly.

seed_data_creation: Test ISOs created/deleted during pytest (TEST_ prefixed items cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully tested. Demo user has: 148 records, 7 spins, 5 ISOs (3 OPEN, 2 FOUND), following 3 users (@waxhunter, @vinylking, @collector4692). Profile page 4 tabs all working. ISO standalone page with stats/search/filters/tags working. Follow modals from profile working with is_following state for each user. Explore People tab has user search and suggestions with inline Follow buttons. Backend route order fixed: /users/discover/suggestions and /users/search placed BEFORE /users/{username} to avoid path conflicts.

features: Tags (OG Press, Factory Sealed, Any, Promo)
Mark-found and delete buttons on items
